body.body:
Sub-ticket of T-substrate-experiment-cascade. Level 4 is currently a _StubLevel that returns EXHAUSTED. This ticket replaces it with a concrete implementation that queries experiment_queue for past Experiments whose hypothesis signature matches the current situation.

## The probe

Given a CascadeSituation, look up OBSERVED experiments in experiment_queue whose hypothesis statement token-set overlaps with the situation query tokens. If any past experiment with outcome=MATCH has a matching signature, return its recorded result as the level-4 match. This is the cheapest form of reusing prior learning — 'I already ran this experiment once, here's what I found.'

## Match criteria

- Past experiment has status in (OBSERVED, UPDATED)
- Past experiment's hypothesis.statement token-set has >= 2 overlapping tokens with situation.query
- Past experiment's outcome is MATCH or PARTIAL (not MISMATCH or INCONCLUSIVE — those are negative evidence for different problems)
- Most-recent match wins on ties

## CascadeResult shape

MATCHED with data being the past Experiment's observation.data payload. The reason string includes the experiment_id so cognition can trace the lookup.

## Out of scope

- Semantic similarity (just token overlap for MVP)
- Result combination across multiple past matches
- Updating the past experiment's metadata on re-use (that's reconsolidation-adjacent)

## Tests

- Empty experiment_queue → EXHAUSTED
- Past experiment with matching tokens → MATCHED
- Past experiment with MISMATCH outcome → not matched (negative evidence skipped)
- Insufficient token overlap → EXHAUSTED
- Multiple matches → most-recent wins
- Degraded gracefully on db failure

## Depends on

T-substrate-experiment-cascade (level registration), T-experiment-primitive-scheduler (experiment_queue table)
body.title: Cascade level 4: past-experiment lookup (replace stub with concrete impl)
body.result: Level4PastExperimentLookup with token-overlap scoring against experiment_queue OBSERVED/UPDATED rows. MATCH/PARTIAL outcomes reused; MISMATCH/INCONCLUSIVE skipped as negative evidence. 20 tests, 2551 total pass.
